product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm very interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV you have listed. It looks like a fantastic set. Is there any flexibility on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV! It's a top-of-the-line model. While I can't go below the wholesale price, I can offer you a competitive deal. Feel free to make an offer so we can work something out.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you're open to an offer. Given the competitive market, I'm looking to spend around $1000 for the LG C3 65-inch.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your position, but the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV is a premium product with exceptional features. Considering its retail price and quality, I can offer you a special price of $1,500. This is a great deal for this top-of-the-line TV.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate the offer, but $1500 is quite a bit higher than I can afford for this TV. I'm really looking for a deal closer to the $1000 mark.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I completely understand your budget considerations. While I can't meet the $1000 mark due to the product's value, I can offer you a discounted price of $1,200 for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. This is the best price I can offer without going below the wholesale price.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you trying to work with me on the price, but $1200 is still beyond my budget for this purchase. I cannot afford it at that price.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget constraints, and I appreciate your interest in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Since I can't go below the wholesale price, I respect your decision. If your circumstances change in the future, feel free to reach out.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I understand. Thank you for your time and for trying to work with me.
